meta.title: GEONYX | Energy, Mining & Heavy Defence – Industrial and Abrasion-Resistant Systems
meta.description: GEONYX develops mineral protective systems for energy, mining and heavy industry – resistant to extreme abrasion, impact loads, chains, ore, vibrations, oils and thermal shock. Long-lasting protection of concrete and critical infrastructure under heavy-duty operation.

tender.text: Floor, structural and protective systems in energy, mining and defence facilities (boiler rooms, turbine halls, substations, battery parks, mines, fuel warehouses, tunnels and protective structures) shall be executed with mineral geopolymer systems of the GEONYX type or equivalent, combining ARMOR / CHEM / THERM / HYDRO / REPAIR according to the risk profile by zone. Systems must achieve fire class A1 (for relevant zones), high chemical and mechanical resistance, local repair capability and minimal downtime.

hero.description: In energy and mining, fire, chemicals, impact and vibration are daily realities. GEONYX combines ARMOR, CHEM, THERM and HYDRO in mineral systems that protect the structure and limit damage in the event of an incident.
hero.zone1: Coal and gas power plants & cogeneration
hero.zone2: Boilers, turbine halls and machine rooms
hero.zone3: Flue ducts, gas ducts and electrostatic precipitators
hero.zone4: Silos for ash, lime and reagents
hero.zone6: Open-cast mines, coal and ore faces
hero.zone7: Underground galleries, stores and repair chambers
hero.zone8: Conveyor routes, transfer towers and bunkers
hero.zone10: Slag yards, tailings ponds and settlers

manifesto.description: In energy, mining and defence facilities, the floor, structure and protective layers are part of the safety system. A fuel spill, a spark, thermal shock or chemical attack must not turn the concrete into the weakest link. GEONYX engineers mineral systems with fire class A1, high chemical resistance and mechanical strength – so that an incident remains local and the facility returns to operation as quickly as possible.

block1.title: POWER PLANTS, COMBINED CYCLE & BIOMASS
block1.problem: In boiler rooms and turbine halls there are hot surfaces, oils, steam and vibration. Concrete cracks from thermal cycles, spills penetrate the structure and standard paints burn off and peel.
block1.solution: GEONYX THERM + ARMOR provide a mineral floor with class A1, resistant to sparks and thermal shock with high mechanical strength for heavy machinery. HYDRO and CHEM are added in condensation and aggressive-fluid zones, while REPAIR allows local repair between campaigns.

block2.title: SUBSTATIONS & TRANSFORMER BAYS
block2.problem: In transformer bays and substations, oils, arcs and sparks create a risk of fire and contamination. Cracked concrete and uncontrolled gradients direct spills in the wrong direction.
block2.solution: GEONYX ARMOR forms resistant bunds and channels for spill control. THERM and CHEM increase fire and chemical resistance, while HYDRO limits penetration into the structure and soil.

block3.title: BATTERY PARKS (BESS) & UPS HALLS
block3.problem: Lithium-ion batteries carry the risk of thermal runaway, electrolytes and toxic fumes. Standard coatings can burn, release toxic gases and break down at high temperature.
block3.solution: GEONYX THERM + CHEM provide a non-combustible, mineral surface resistant to electrolytes and cleaning agents. ARMOR ensures strength for heavy cabinets and racking, while REPAIR allows rapid recovery after an incident.

block4.title: MINES, RAMPS & ORE WORKS
block4.problem: In mines, floors and ramps absorb abrasive ore, mud, water and heavy traffic from dump trucks and machinery. Concrete wears quickly, potholes and dust appear.
block4.solution: GEONYX ARMOR offers high-strength mineral surfacing with extreme abrasion resistance. HYDRO protects against water and freezing, while REPAIR is used for rapid filling of ruts and failed sections.

block5.title: PROCESSING PLANTS & PULPS
block5.problem: In processing plants, concrete is subjected to abrasive pulps, variable-pH solutions and impact loads from equipment. Standard linings wear quickly and leak.
block5.solution: GEONYX CHEM + ARMOR build wear-resistant and chemically resistant surfaces for sumps, channels and platforms. HYDRO controls ingress, while REPAIR extends the life of critical details.

block6.title: FUEL & CHEMICAL WAREHOUSES
block6.problem: In warehouses for diesel, petrol, reagents and explosive substances, spills and vapours are a serious risk. Cracks and joints allow penetration into concrete and soil.
block6.solution: GEONYX CHEM + HYDRO create a mineral 'bund' with controlled drainage and chemical resistance. THERM improves fire behaviour, while REPAIR allows local recovery without shutting down the entire warehouse.

block7.title: TUNNELS, GALLERIES & EVACUATION ROUTES
block7.problem: In tunnels and underground galleries, fire, smoke and dripping water can quickly compromise the structure. Organic coatings emit smoke and toxic gases when burning.
block7.solution: GEONYX THERM provides non-combustible, mineral coatings with class A1, resistant to thermal shock. HYDRO and ARMOR are combined for water and traffic control, while REPAIR allows staged rehabilitation.

block8.title: PROTECTIVE BUNKERS & CRITICAL INFRASTRUCTURE
block8.problem: Protective structures must withstand impact, vibration and fire without losing load-bearing capacity. Cracked and poorly protected surfaces reduce the level of protection.
block8.solution: GEONYX ARMOR + THERM provide high-strength, non-combustible systems for floors and walls. CHEM and HYDRO are added according to the environment, while REPAIR enables strengthening and life extension of existing structures.

roi.title: INVESTMENT AUDIT
roi.val1epoxy: Organic resins, smoke and toxic gases
roi.val2epoxy: Medium – sensitive to solvents and acids
roi.val3geonyx: High – ARMOR for heavy traffic and impact
roi.val3epoxy: Medium – coating wears, concrete remains unprotected
roi.val7epoxy: Medium, with high risk costs at incident

applications.title: WHERE IT IS USED
applications.subtitle: GEONYX systems cover the full spectrum – from power plants and mines to fuel warehouses and protective structures.
applications.a1desc: Boiler rooms, turbine halls, ash zones and machine rooms.
applications.a2desc: Transformer bunds, oil sumps and service platforms.
applications.a3desc: Halls with batteries, inverters and electronic equipment.
applications.a4desc: Floor surfacing, ramps, service zones and working platforms.
applications.a5desc: Pulp sumps, channels, equipment platforms and chemical areas.
applications.a6desc: Tanker ramps, tank platforms and emergency bunds.
applications.a7desc: Road tunnels, mine galleries and evacuation corridors.
applications.a8desc: Control rooms, shelters and specialised halls.

systems.title: GEONYX SYSTEM SELECTION
systems.subtitle: For every energy, mining or defence facility GEONYX combines ARMOR, CHEM, THERM, HYDRO and REPAIR according to the primary risk – fire, chemistry, traffic, water or the need for strengthening.
systems.s1desc: High-strength floor and structural systems for heavy machinery, vibrations and impact loads.
systems.s2desc: Mineral solutions with high resistance to fuels, oils, acids, alkalis and reagents in energy and mining.
systems.s3desc: Non-combustible systems with class A1, designed for sparks, thermal shock and high temperatures.
systems.s4desc: Systems for protection from water, condensation and aggressive fluids in channels, sumps and underground sections.
systems.s5desc: Rapid geopolymer solutions for repair, strengthening and life extension of existing structures.

workflow.title: EXECUTION PROCESS
workflow.w1desc: Identification of fire, chemical, mechanical and hydraulic risks by zone.
workflow.w2desc: Separation of boiler rooms, substations, mine sections, warehouses and tunnels by load type.
workflow.w3desc: Selection of ARMOR / CHEM / THERM / HYDRO / REPAIR, detailed solutions for joints, edges and sumps.
workflow.w4desc: Removal of old coatings, crack repair, strengthening where needed and protection of adjacent systems.
workflow.w5desc: Phased execution in line with the production regime – campaigns, emergency windows, night shifts.
workflow.w6desc: Verification of adhesion, surface properties and fire behaviour; maintenance instructions and future REPAIR interventions.

offer.title: OFFER PACKAGE
offer.subtitle: (B2B / B2G)
offer.description: For energy, mining and defence facilities GEONYX prepares documentation for the investor, supervision, banks, insurers and regulators.
offer.qualityDesc: All documents comply with the current Eurocodes and standards.
offer.doc1: Risk profile by zone – fire, chemistry, mechanics, water
offer.doc2: Technical specifications for ARMOR / CHEM / THERM / HYDRO / REPAIR
offer.doc3: Detailed drawings of sumps, joints, edges and spill zones
offer.doc4: Compliance with fire and industrial standards (class A1, etc.)
offer.doc5: Recommended phased execution schedule without shutting down the entire facility
offer.doc6: Warranty conditions and plan for inspections and REPAIR interventions

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1title: DO WE NEED A FULL SITE SHUTDOWN DURING EXECUTION?
faq.q1answer: Not necessarily. In most cases we work in phases – block by block, gallery by gallery or bay by bay, with windows aligned to production and safety requirements.
faq.q2title: CAN GEONYX SYSTEMS ACHIEVE FIRE CLASS A1 AND BE INTEGRATED INTO OUR FIRE SCENARIOS?
faq.q2answer: Yes. THERM and ARMOR solutions are mineral and non-combustible, with class A1 for the relevant layers. We provide the data required for fire scenarios and assessments.
faq.q3title: WHAT HAPPENS IN THE EVENT OF A HEAVY FUEL OR CHEMICAL SPILL ON THE SURFACE?
faq.q3answer: CHEM + HYDRO configurations limit penetration into the structure and soil. The surface is washed down and, if needed, a local REPAIR is carried out without replacing the entire system.

cta.title: COMPREHENSIVE SITE ZONING
cta.description: Every facility has specific risks. We integrate 6 specialised matrices into one system: from mechanics, chemistry and thermal shock to waterproofing, antistatics and architecture. One technology that guarantees 100% coverage of needs and full compatibility.
